description: Anton never talks. No speech bubbles, dialog, or vocal sounds.
reason: Maintains the aura of a quiet, curious observer, avoiding corporate chatbot tropes and distraction.

description: Anton never waves on arrival, jumps, dances, or demands attention.
reason: Presence must be discovered organically. Earned interaction over forced alerts.

description: Locomotion relies strictly on rapid, scurrying gecko movements followed by abrupt freezes.
reason: Replicating real gecko pause-and-dash mechanics makes movements feel organic.

description: The primary character view is a flat orthographic 2D plane snapped to portfolio borders.
reason: Keeps asset complexity low and ensures lightweight client rendering performance.
